title: NVR: A Unique Home Builder That's Reasonably Priced
text: Over the last decade, NVR has established an impressive track record for growth, profitability, debt management, and share repurchases. There has been much speculation about the risks of an upcoming recession that would negatively affect NVR.

title: Battered homebuilder stocks may be primed for a new rally as US mortgage rates look set to drop in 2023, Bank of America says
text: BofA is anticipating a drop in the 30-year mortgage rate to about 5.25% this year - a move favorable to homebuilding stocks.

title: NVR: A Top Homebuilder Pick At BofA, Valuation And Technicals Support Higher Prices
text: Homebuilder equities have been beating the market for more than 6 months despite a weak housing market. NVR was named a top fundamental and technical pick at BofA.

title: Mortgage rates should keep falling, boosting home-builder stocks, analysts say
text: Shares of home builders enjoyed a broad rally Wednesday after BofA Securities said it sees a “favorable setup” for the sector, with lower mortgage rates on the horizon.
